hero.title: Dilia la Cave
hero.subtitle: The taste of wine and sharing

story.title: The Story
story.subtitle: Opened in 2021
story.description:
Opened in October 2021, Dilia la Cave extends the restaurant's spirit through a wine selection conceived as a journey between Italy and France. More than just a wine shop, it's a neighborhood enoteca, lively and convivial, dedicated to committed winemakers and wines with character.

Dilia la Cave is an invitation to share, to curiosity and to pleasure — that of good wine, told with passion.

wines.title: Wines
wines.subtitle: Our selection
wines.description: The selection highlights organic, biodynamic and natural wines, mainly imported directly from Italian winemakers. You'll find rare and original references, sometimes unavailable elsewhere, that pair wonderfully with Dilia's cuisine. Whether you're building your personal cellar, looking for a meaningful gift, or sharing an exceptional wine with friends, each visit is a discovery.

events.title: Aperitif & Cicchetti
events.subtitle: A moment to share
events.description: La Cave is also a place for aperitifs. You can gather around wines by the glass, accompanied by cicchetti prepared at Dilietta, just next door, using house products, homemade focaccia and a selection of Italian charcuterie.

photos.title: Photos
photos.subtitle: The atmosphere
photos.description: Discover the warm atmosphere of La Cave through our images.
